reference: Hello Doctor, for the last week, I have been having issues with my erection at bedtime. I am thirty-five years old. Please suggest some medicines to be taken at bedtime to have a relationship with my wife without any problems. I am feeling very bad at bedtime. I used an oil one week ago, and since then, I have been having erection problems. Please suggest some curable medicines right now.
text: Do you have a different shirt?
